chapter_title: Instructions for both single and multi-quote procurements
snippet: The Flowchart for single and multi-quote low-value construction procurements (in the Resources tab ) instructs schools how to procure construction contracts valued between $5,000 and $150,000 (including GST) in compliance with this policy. For all construction works or services expected to be valued between $5,000 and $75,000 (including GST), schools must source at least one supplier quote and upload the quote to AIMS. However, the VSBA recommends seeking multiple quotes wherever possible. For all construction works or services expected to be valued between $75,001 and $150,000 (including GST), schools must source at least 3 supplier quotes and upload the quotes to AIMS. For all construction works or services expected to be valued above $150,000 (including GST), schools must not obtain tenders or quotations, or commence or enter into any associated works, services or contracts, until they have sought VSBA approval to proceed. The AIMS quick reference guide for external contractor work orders (staff login required) External Link instructs schools on the method of processing external contractor work orders in AIMS, including how to upload quotes and attest to school council approval.
